name: Gazlowe
description: A Summoner that specializes in controlling key areas of the battleground.
title: Boss of Ratchet
info: Few would consider Gazlowe a fighter, but what he lacks in height, he makes up in mechanical know-how. Besides, you don't get to be boss of a "boom"-town like Ratchet with just a charming personality, if you know what I mean.

Gazlowe.name: Rock-It! Turret
Gazlowe.description: Create a turret that deals 36 (+4% per level) damage. Loses Health over 20 seconds.  Turrets prioritize the nearest enemy Hero when first created.

Gazlowe.name: Deth Lazor
Gazlowe.description: After 0.65 seconds, deal 175 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a line. Heal for 25% of the damage dealt, increased to 75% against enemy Heroes.

Gazlowe.name: Xplodium Charge
Gazlowe.description: Place a bomb that deals 142 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within the target area after 1.25 seconds. Enemies hit are also Stunned for 1 second.

Gazlowe.name: Robo-Goblin
Gazlowe.description: Activate to become Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Basic Attacks deal 100 (+4% per level) bonus damage over 5 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

Gazlowe.name: Grav-O-Bomb 3000
Gazlowe.description: After a 1.5 second delay, pull enemies toward the center of an area, dealing 220 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. Basic Abilities deal 30% more damage for 5 seconds after casting Grav-O-Bomb 3000.

Gazlowe.name: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle
Gazlowe.description: Regenerate 1 Scrap every 4 seconds. Destroyed Rock-It! Turrets drop 1 Scrap, which can be picked up.  Activate to destroy a target Rock-It! Turret.

Gazlowe.name: Focus Turrets!
Gazlowe.description: Orders any nearby Rock-It! Turrets to focus the target.

1.name: Rocket Boots
1.description: Increase the cast range of Xplodium Charge by 30% and its damage by 35%. Hitting an enemy Hero increases Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.

1.name: Big Game Hunter
1.description: Increase maximum Scrap by 2. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes, Mercenaries, or Monsters accelerates Reduce, Reuse, Recycle Scrap regeneration by 1.5 seconds.

1.name: One Man Wrecking Crew
1.description: Casting Basic Abilities cause Gazlowe's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds to deal 60% more damage. Stores up to 2 charges.

4.name: Rock It Sock It
4.description: Casting Rock-It! Turret grants Gazlowe a Shield that absorbs up to 200 (+4% per level) damage for 2.5 seconds.

4.name: Hyperfocus Coils
4.description: Heroes hit by Deth Lazor or Xplodium Charge take an additional 2% of their maximum Health in damage. Gazlowe is healed for 150% of the damage dealt.

4.name: EZ-PZ Dimensional Ripper
4.description: Activate to gain 40 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 40%, and reduce damage dealt by all nearby enemy Heroes and Summons by 50% for 3 seconds

7.name: Goblin Fusion
7.description: Generate 3 Scrap for each Hero hit by Deth Lazor.

7.name: Overload
7.description: Deth Lazor can now store up to 2 charges. Each enemy Hero hit by Deth Lazor reduces its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.

7.name: Master Blaster
7.description: Deth Lazor and Xplodium Charge Slow enemies hit by 35% for 3 seconds. Rock-It! Turret Basic Attacks against enemies Slowed in this way extend the Slow duration by 0.5 seconds.

10.name: Robo-Goblin
10.description: Activate to become Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Basic Attacks deal 100 (+4% per level) bonus damage over 5 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

10.name: Grav-O-Bomb 3000
10.description: After a 1.5 second delay, pull enemies toward the center of an area, dealing 220 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. Basic Abilities deal 30% more damage for 5 seconds after casting Grav-O-Bomb 3000.

13.name: Positive Reinforcement
13.description: Primary Rock-It! Turret attacks against Heroes increase Gazlowe's Attack Speed by 40% for 3 seconds.

13.name: Superior Schematics
13.description: Rock-It! Turrets attack up to 2 additional enemies for 60% damage and have 30% increased Basic Attack range.

13.name: Overcharged Capacitors
13.description: Gazlowe gains 5% Spell Power for each active Rock-It! Turret, up to a maximum of 15%. Dealing Basic Attack damage heals Rock-It! Turrets by 8% of their max health.

16.name: Firin' Mah Lazorz
16.description: Firing Deth Lazor causes all of Gazlowe's Rock-It! Turrets to fire a Deth Lazor of their own that deals 125 (+4% per level) damage.

16.name: Ark Reaktor
16.description: Reduce the cooldown of Xplodium Charge by 2 seconds. Casting Xplodium Charge creates 3 miniature Rock-It! Turrets that last for 3 seconds.  These Turrets do not drop Scrap or benefit from other Talents.

16.name: Overklock
16.description: Basic Attacks grant Gazlowe 15% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.  Dealing Basic Attack damage to Heroes causes them to take an additional 2.5% of their maximum Health as damage.

20.name: Mecha-Lord
20.description: Basic Attacks increase Gazlowe's Armor by 10 for 10 seconds, up to a maximum of 30, and deal 50% bonus damage to Stunned or Slowed enemies.

20.name: Miniature Black Hole
20.description: Increase Grav-O-Bomb 3000's radius by 25% and its damage by 50%. Each enemy Hero pulled reduces its cooldown by 12 seconds.

20.name: It's Raining Scrap
20.description: Reduce the Scrap cost of Rock-It! Turrets by 1. Regain 2 Scrap for each Scrap pickup.

20.name: Bomb Toss
20.description: Xplodium Charge gains a 2nd charge with a 3 second cooldown between uses and launches 2 more bombs when it detonates.

tooltipMarkup.GazloweBigGameHunter: Increase maximum Scrap by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,GazloweBigGameHunter,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c>. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes, Mercenaries, or Monsters accelerates Reduce, Reuse, Recycle Scrap regeneration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,GazloweReduceReuseRecycleTraitCooldownReduction,Value"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweDethLazor: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,GazloweDethLazor,CastIntroTime" precision="2"/></c> seconds, deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DethLazorCharged1Damage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in a line. Heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,DethLazorCharged1Damage,LeechFraction[Life]" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> of the damage dealt, increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,DethLazorCharged1Damage,LeechFraction[Life]*(Effect,DethLazorCharged1Damage,LeechMultiplicativeModifierArray[Hero].Modifier+1)" player="0"/>%</c> against enemy Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweDethLazorFirinMahLazorz: Firing Deth Lazor causes all of Gazlowe's Rock-It! Turrets to fire a Deth Lazor of their own that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TinkerDethLazorFirinMahLazorzTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweDethLazorGoblinFusionTalent: Generate <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GazloweDethLazorGoblinFusionManaHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Scrap for each Hero hit by Deth Lazor.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweHyperfocusCoils: Heroes hit by Deth Lazor or Xplodium Charge take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,GazloweHyperfocusCoilsPercentMaxHealthDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of their maximum Health in damage. Gazlowe is healed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,GazloweHyperfocusCoilsPercentMaxHealthDamage,LeechFraction[Life]"/>%</c> of the damage dealt.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweMasterBlaster: Deth Lazor and Xplodium Charge Slow enemies hit by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,GazloweMasterBlasterSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweMasterBlasterSlow,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Rock-It! Turret Basic Attacks against enemies Slowed in this way extend the Slow duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GazloweMasterBlasterTurretSlowExtend,Value" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweOneManWreckingCrew: Casting Basic Abilities cause Gazlowe's next Basic Attack within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweOneManWreckingCrewCasterBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds to deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,TinkerWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[OneManWreckingCrew].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage. Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweOneManWreckingCrewCasterBehavior,MaxStackCount"/></c> charges.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweOverklock: Basic Attacks grant Gazlowe <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,GazloweOverklockBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" precision="2"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweOverklockBuff,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Dealing Basic Attack damage to Heroes causes them to take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,GazloweOverklockPercentMaxHealthDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]" precision="2"/>%</c> of their maximum Health as damage.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweOverload: Deth Lazor can now store up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges. Each enemy Hero hit by Deth Lazor reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,GazloweDethLazorOverloadCooldownReduction,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweReduceReuseRecycleTrait: Regenerate <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Scrap every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweReduceReuseRecycleTraitScrapRegenerationCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds. Destroyed Rock-It! Turrets drop <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Scrap, which can be picked up.</n></n>Activate to destroy a target Rock-It! Turret.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweRockItSockIt: Casting Rock-It! Turret grants Gazlowe a Shield that absorbs up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweRockItSockItShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweRockItSockItShield,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweRockItTurretOverchargedCapacitors: Gazlowe gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,TinkerOverchargedCapacitorsSpellpowerBonusAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> Spell Power for each active Rock-It! Turret, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,TinkerOverchargedCapacitorsSpellpowerBonusAccumulator,MaxAccumulation"/>%</c>. Dealing Basic Attack damage heals Rock-It! Turrets by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,GazloweOverchargedCapacitorsTurretDurationIncrease,RechargeVitalFraction" precision="2"/>%</c> of their max health.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweRockItTurretPositiveReinforcement: Primary Rock-It! Turret attacks against Heroes increase Gazlowe's Attack Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,GazloweRockItTurretPositiveReinforcementBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweRockItTurretPositiveReinforcementEnabler,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweRockItTurretSuperiorSchematics: Rock-It! Turrets attack up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RockItTurretRelicSearch,MaxCount"/></c> additional enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100(100*Effect,RockItTurretWeaponRelicSideDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[SuperiorSchematics].Modifier)"/>%</c> damage and have <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,GazloweRockItTurretSuperiorSchematics,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value) -1 *100"/>%</c> increased Basic Attack range.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweXplodiumChargeArkReaktor: Reduce the cooldown of Xplodium Charge by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Talent,GazloweXplodiumChargeArkReaktor,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds. Casting Xplodium Charge creates <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GazloweXplodiumChargeArkReaktorTurretPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> miniature Rock-It! Turrets that last for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweXplodiumChargeArkReaktorTurretTimedLifeBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>These Turrets do not drop Scrap or benefit from other Talents.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweXplodiumChargeBombToss: Xplodium Charge gains a <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2nd</c> charge with a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,TinkerXplodiumBomb,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> second cooldown between uses and launches <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GazloweXplodiumChargeBombTossRandomLocationPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> more bombs when it detonates.
tooltipMarkup.GazloweXplodiumChargeRocketBoots: Increase the cast range of Xplodium Charge by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,GazloweXplodiumChargeRocketBoots,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Abil,TinkerXplodiumBomb,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c> and its damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,XplodiumBombDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[RocketBoots].Modifier"/>%</c>. Hitting an enemy Hero increases Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,GazloweXplodiumChargeRocketBootsBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweXplodiumChargeRocketBootsBuff,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TinkerDethLazorEZPZDimensionalRipperTale: Activate to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweDethLazorEZPZDimensionalRipperBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweDethLazorEZPZDimensionalRipperBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds, reducing damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweDethLazorEZPZDimensionalRipperBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/>%</c>, and reduce damage dealt by all nearby enemy Heroes and Summons by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,GazloweDethLazorEZPZDimensionalRipperActivatedDebuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweDethLazorEZPZDimensionalRipperActivatedDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds
tooltipMarkup.TinkerFocusTurrets: Orders any nearby Rock-It! Turrets to focus the target.
tooltipMarkup.TinkerGravOBomb3000: After a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GravOBomb3000Persistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]+Effect,GravOBomb3000Persistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[1]" precision="1"/></c> second delay, pull enemies toward the center of an area, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GravOBomb3000Damage,Amount"/></c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweGravOBomb3000Stun,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds. Basic Abilities deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RockItTurretWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[GravOBomb].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweGravOBomb3000BasicAbilityDamageBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds after casting Grav-O-Bomb 3000.
tooltipMarkup.TinkerGravOBombMiniatureBlackHoleTalent: Increase Grav-O-Bomb 3000's radius by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> and its damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,GravOBomb3000Damage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[MiniatureBlackHole].Modifier"/>%</c>. Each enemy Hero pulled reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,GazloweGravOBomb3000CooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TinkerItsRainingScrap: Reduce the Scrap cost of Rock-It! Turrets by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,TinkerItsRainingScrap,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c>. Regain <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Scrap for each Scrap pickup.
tooltipMarkup.TinkerRoboGoblinMechaLordTalent: Basic Attacks increase Gazlowe's Armor by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweRoboGoblinArmorIncrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweRoboGoblinArmorIncrease,Duration"/></c> seconds, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweRoboGoblinArmorIncrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus * Behavior,GazloweRoboGoblinArmorIncrease,ArmorModification.StackCount"/></c>, and deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,TinkerWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[TinkerRoboGoblinMechaLord].Modifier"/>%</c> bonus damage to Stunned or Slowed enemies.
tooltipMarkup.TinkerRoboGoblinPassive: Activate to become Unstoppable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweRoboGoblinUnstoppableBuff,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds. </n></n><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GazloweRoboGoblinDotDamage,Amount*Behavior,GazloweRoboGoblinDoT,PeriodCount"/></c> bonus damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GazloweRoboGoblinDoT,Duration"/></c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="1+Behavior,GazloweRoboGoblinDotDamageToken,Max"/></c> times.
tooltipMarkup.TinkerRockItTurret: Create a turret that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RockItTurretWeaponDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. Loses Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Unit,TinkerRockItTurret,LifeMax/Unit,TinkerRockItTurret,LifeRegenRate"/></c> seconds. </n></n>Turrets prioritize the nearest enemy Hero when first created.
tooltipMarkup.TinkerXplodiumCharge: Place a bomb that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,XplodiumBombDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies within the target area after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,XplodiumBombCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Enemies hit are also Stunned for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,XplodiumBombStun,Duration"Precision="2" player="0"/></c> second.
